body_shape: round volcanic boulder-shaped body with cracked rocky texture and glowing ember highlights, short stumpy arms, tiny rocket-fin boots
mouth_pose: mouth open wide in a tall vertical oval shape, tongue tip curled sharply up and back toward the roof of the mouth like a breaking wave, underside of the curled tongue visible, small fangs flanking the corners, /r/ retroflex articulation
sound_gesture: low growl stance, fists planted on the sides of the body, chest puffed out
word_decor: a rabbit-ear costume hood with one bent tip on the head
expression: confident flashing eyes, eyebrows furrowed bold

voice.character_description: raspy bright child voice with rolled r, energetic, slightly barky

clips.greet: Rrrr! Are you brave enough to roar my sound?
clips.gentle_retry: Curl your tongue up and back. One more.
clips.friday_acknowledge: You earned my roar. Carry it proudly.
